hook.summary: High-speed slot machine wins with lightning effects and a rapidly climbing coin counter.
hook.visual_action: Slot reels spin and land on matching symbols like cherries and bells, accompanied by electric visual effects.

scene_flow: Rapid slot spins showing various winning combinations with lightning effects.
A full screen of golden bells triggers a massive coin payout.
A full screen of red 7s triggers another massive coin payout.
End card appears with a large diamond and a call to action to claim free coins.
on_screen_text: In game rewards are not real money
audience_proxy: Adults 35+ who enjoy the thrill of high-stakes casino slots and frequent rewards.
